title: ExtractionResult
description: What the GPT-5.6 extractor must return for a single fetched document. The model extracts signals; it never scores. Everything must be grounded in quotedSpan from the document.

artifactId.description: must match an id in registry.v1.json

present.description: true ONLY if the document itself evidences this artifact

quotedSpan.description: exact text from the document backing present=true; empty string if present=false

elementsPresent.description: for element-scored artifacts (e.g. genai_policy), which required elements the text satisfies
